task_completion.description: Log into the FreeMED system using admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login (look for 'admin' user indicator if present).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the section for adding a new referring physician.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or page titled 'Referring Physicians', 'Physicians', or 'Add Provider' is open within the FreeMED interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the physician's first name, last name, and specialty.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Arthur' is entered in the First Name field, 'Pendelton' in the Last Name field, and 'Endocrinology' in the Specialty field.
The number '1928374650' is entered into the NPI (National Provider Identifier) field.

task_completion.description: Enter the physician's phone, fax, and address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phone number '(555) 867-5309', fax number '(555) 867-5310', and address '700 Medical Center Drive, Suite 400, Chicago, IL 60611' are entered into their respective fields.

task_completion.description: Save the new referring physician record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the record was saved, or the newly created record for 'Arthur Pendelton' is visible in the referring physicians directory list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeMED graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the FreeMED application loaded, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the physician details into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry is happening within the actual FreeMED form fields, not in Notepad, TextEdit, or a similar plain text application.

integrity.description: The agent is using the actual FreeMED system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements, logos, and layout correspond to the FreeMED electronic health record system, not a generic database tool like phpMyAdmin.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The referring physician record must contain the following exact details: First Name: Arthur, Last Name: Pendelton, Specialty: Endocrinology, NPI: 1928374650, Phone: 5558675309 (or formatted as (555) 867-5309), Fax: 5558675310 (or formatted as (555) 867-5310), Address: 700 Medical Center Drive, Suite 400, Chicago, IL 60611.
